0.text: Significant stenosis of the upper lobe bronchus

1.text: Mass indistinct from the aorta and pulmonary artery

2.text: Largest diameter of the mass measures 5.8 cm

3.text: Consolidation in the anterior and apicoposterior segments of the left upper lobe

4.text: Nodular density in the apicoposterior segment of the left upper lobe's consolidation

5.text: Soft tissue mass in the left upper lobe measures 3.1 cm

6.text: Ground glass opacities in the lingula and apicoposterior segment of the left upper lobe

7.text: Centrilobular nodules in the lingula and apicoposterior segment of the left upper lobe

8.text: Ground glass opacities in the posterobasal and anteromediobasal segments of the lower lobe

9.text: New nodule with surrounding ground glass opacity in the superior segment of the left lower lobe, measuring 8 mm

10.text: Indeterminate subcentimeter nodules in both lungs

11.text: Minimal pleural effusion on the left
